name: Potato Kugel Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the potatoes and potato water.
2. Mix in the vegetable oil, salt, sugar, bread flour, yeast, and wheat germ until a soft dough forms.
3. Form the dough into a loaf shape and place it on a greased baking sheet.
4. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 45-50 minutes or until golden brown and firm to the touch.
5. Allow the bread to cool before slicing and serving.
